page.title: Day Charter Marbella: All-Inclusive Yacht Hire

data.meta_description: Book an all-inclusive day charter Marbella from €749/2h. Licensed skipper, drinks & snacks included. Depart Puerto Banús. Instant WhatsApp booking.
data.summary: Compare all-inclusive day charter Marbella prices and yachts from Puerto Banús. Every hire includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT with no hidden fees.
key_facts: Day charter Marbella from €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39).
All rates include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT.
Mangusta 80 day charter from €4,719 for 4 hours with free jet ski.
All boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Maximum capacity ranges from 5 to 12 passengers.
Book via WhatsApp – no online booking fee.
Popular destinations: Cabopino, Estepona, Cala del Faro.

faq.q: What is included in a day charter Marbella?
faq.a: Every day charter Marbella includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

faq.q: How much does a day charter Marbella cost?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. The Mangusta 80 costs €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Do I need a boat licence to charter a yacht?
faq.a: No. Every day charter Marbella comes with a fully licensed skipper who handles navigation, mooring, and safety. You just relax.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.a: Yes. You may bring additional food and drinks. Our standard charter includes a selection of beverages and snacks, but you are welcome to customise.

faq.q: How many people can join a day charter?
faq.a: Capacity varies by yacht. The Dubhe (8m) takes up to 5 passengers, the Astondoa 40 takes 9, and most larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 or Ferretti 94 take 12 passengers.

faq.q: Where do day charters depart from?
faq.a: All our day charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. We can arrange pick-up from Marbella Marina or other nearby ports on request.

faq.q: What should I wear on a day charter?
faq.a: Light clothing, swimwear, sunscreen, a hat, and non-slip shoes. Even in summer, bring a light jacket or windbreaker for the afternoon breeze.

faq.q: Can I cancel or reschedule my day charter?
faq.a: Yes, subject to our cancellation policy. Contact us via WhatsApp at least 48 hours before departure for a full refund or reschedule. Weather cancellations are free.

data.body_html:
For a day charter Marbella that combines luxury, convenience, and transparent pricing, our fleet departs from Puerto Banús with everything included. No hidden fees, no extra charges for skipper or fuel – just you, the Mediterranean, and a choice of yachts from €749 for 2 hours up to 12 passengers.

Why choose an all-inclusive day charter Marbella?

Every booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). That means the price you see is the price you pay. Whether you take a 2-hour spin along the Golden Mile or an 8-hour cruise to Estepona, there are no surprises.

Our base is Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's yachting scene. From here, you can reach Cabopino in 20 minutes, Cala del Faro in 30, or Estepona in 45. All routes are flexible – your skipper adapts to your plans.

Day charter Marbella pricing – clear and competitive

YachtLengthMax guestsPrice from
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749 / 2h → €2,299 / 8h
Azimut 3912.5m11€749 / 2h → €2,299 / 8h
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719 / 4h (jet ski included)
Other yachts8m–29m5–12Price on request via WhatsApp

For the Mangusta 80, the minimum charter is 4 hours and a free jet ski is included. All other yachts are priced individually – just message us on WhatsApp for a custom quote.

Our fleet for your day charter Marbella

We operate 19 boats from Puerto Banús. Here are the most popular for day charters:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – ideal for small groups, great fuel economy, sunbathing aft deck.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – sporty flybridge, extra seating, perfect for families.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – open sport yacht, top speed 38 knots, jet ski included.
  • Sunseeker Predator 58 (17.6m, 11 pax) – iconic British design, spacious cockpit.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – flybridge luxury, full galley, stabilisers for comfort.

For a complete list, visit our fleet overview.

Popular itineraries for your day charter Marbella

Your skipper knows the coast. Suggest one of these routes:

  • Puerto Banús → Cabopino (20 min each way) – swim at Cabopino beach, lunch at a chiringuito, return.
  • Puerto Banús → Cala del Faro (30 min each way) – secluded cove with clear water, snorkelling spot.
  • Puerto Banús → Estepona (45 min each way) – harbour town with marina restaurants, dolphin spotting en route.
  • Puerto Banús → Sotogrande (1 hour each way) – exclusive resort, golf course views, longer cruise.

All routes can be mixed. Want to anchor off the Golden Mile and watch the sunset? Just say so.

What to expect on a day charter Marbella

On arrival at Puerto Banús, your skipper will greet you at the dock. After a safety briefing, you cast off. The boat has a shaded saloon, sun pads, a bathroom, and a sound system. Drinks and snacks are served throughout. You can swim, sunbathe, or just enjoy the views of La Concha mountain.

Most charters include a stop for swimming. If you book the Mangusta 80, the jet ski adds a thrill. The skipper will also point out landmarks like the Río Verde beach and the luxury villas of the Golden Mile.

Book your day charter Marbella today

Booking is simple. Choose your yacht, send us a WhatsApp message, and we confirm availability within minutes. No online booking fees, no deposit stress. Payment is made before departure.

For a day charter Marbella that delivers on value and experience, browse our full fleet and message us now.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a day charter Marbella?

Every day charter Marbella includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

How much does a day charter Marbella cost?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. The Mangusta 80 costs €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Do I need a boat licence to charter a yacht?

No. Every day charter Marbella comes with a fully licensed skipper who handles navigation, mooring, and safety. You just relax.

Can I bring my own food and drinks?

Yes. You may bring additional food and drinks. Our standard charter includes a selection of beverages and snacks, but you are welcome to customise.

How many people can join a day charter?

Capacity varies by yacht. The Dubhe (8m) takes up to 5 passengers, the Astondoa 40 takes 9, and most larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 or Ferretti 94 take 12 passengers.

Where do day charters depart from?

All our day charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. We can arrange pick-up from Marbella Marina or other nearby ports on request.

What should I wear on a day charter?

Light clothing, swimwear, sunscreen, a hat, and non-slip shoes. Even in summer, bring a light jacket or windbreaker for the afternoon breeze.

Can I cancel or reschedule my day charter?

Yes, subject to our cancellation policy. Contact us via WhatsApp at least 48 hours before departure for a full refund or reschedule. Weather cancellations are free.
